item.title: Rosario Dawson with Baby Grogu, Mark Hamill, and Hamill's young Luke Skywalker stunt double, Graham Hamilton.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1118 (ray of pitch black)
item.description:
Good morning everyone, the universe has once again seen fit to keep me alive for another day, so here I am to bring chaos and memes. Let's get this bread.
"The Grey King and the Silver Flame Attunement"
And we would speak with the trees.
*pedantic comment* the Venus fly trap traps bugs because of a lack of nitrogen.
"Homo sapiens boy together again with his Neanderthal girl on the first warm day of Spring." I think the artist is Gabriella Hudson? So fucking adorable.
Another Trey the Explainer meme.
Love this derpy floofosaur.
A few leftover Roman history memes.
I would love the chance to destroy 900 pancakes with my friends.
Three Chinas Policy worked great until the Mongols came.
Oh great, ANOTHER ONE.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning! Glory Pippin! I love you too. "
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: My 15th favorite and it's my birthday :)
item.description:
15th fav
This was the sky of my town I took last week. I thought this cloud was interesting and rare form to me. Imgur and I are sharing a birthday so forgive me to post two images! FP edit: Thanks guys and thanks for the accolades! It's 1 am here in Japan. It's been two hours after I submitted this post and I appriciate your comments. I'm going to bed soon, thanks again.
item.dc:creator: IliveIdyeIliveagain

item.title: Friday dump
item.dc:creator: Ragga001

item.title: The 410th
item.description:
Are they OK? How did they get hurt?
STAY TUNED! I'm running out of MeeMays again and I'm going to be cutting down posting frequency for a little while. I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild EVERY OTHER Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
How is anyone this dumb?
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #SoundOn #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.dc:creator: OhHeyItsKeraShae

item.title: They found a bomb in my garden and it looks like a guinea pig
item.description: I live in Berlin. Yesterday my apartment building in Wilmersdorf was evacuated because an unexploded bomb in the garden. If you squint, it looks like a guinea pig. That's pretty much all I have to contribute at this time.
item.dc:creator: HungryJoe

item.title: Images of Note: We can be terrible together
item.description:
Best kind of relationship!
Attention K-Mart shoppers is a gender neutral form of address
I own him money
https://youtu.be/P49lBbJSpdQ
me at life
owo
BEGIN THE PURGE!
As Rebecca Sugar once said: MAKE IT GAYER
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cYJYzzT02MA
SHE'S HIGH AS BALLS!
mood
my name is based on pun :)
oh come now, the sewer creature is useful.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I painted something
item.description: I made this lil painting of a Street I like in Oslo, Norway. Used watercolor, gouache and spent so many hours on tiny details with pen. The red and blue houses are Oslos best winebar and restaurant in my opinion. Have a lovely weekend ya beatiful bastards! www.instagram.com/vannfarger
item.dc:creator: PaintMags

item.title: It's the guy from Hateno Village

item.title: It's my cakeday so here's my cat
item.description:
8 years and first time I've caught it. This is Lunetta who is far too beautiful for me and knows it.
Stepping out
Patiently waiting for food - she's an excellent ambush predator.
Doing a sneaky
Lazin'
Dog tax
item.dc:creator: Surprisesupplies
